jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Dash Search Indexing
jobs.content:
About the role

Own the Dropbox Dash universal-search indexing pipeline that fans out across Drive, Slack, and Notion connectors to surface enterprise-knowledge results in sub-100ms p99 latency.

  • Distributed-systems and search-relevance experience required

jobs.title: Senior Manager, Customer Success — Dash for Business
jobs.content: Own the Dropbox Dash for Business customer-success motion across enterprise-account adoption of the Dash universal-search workspace, the Sign e-signature surface (formerly HelloSign), and the FormSwift document-automation product line.
